meta.title: Zadelkhair Abdelkoddous | Junior Software Engineer

hero.title: I build reliable web software, APIs, and AI-assisted workflows.
hero.lead: I am a Casablanca-based software engineer with a master's in Data Science and Data Engineering. My experience spans Laravel and JavaScript applications, REST APIs, Linux-based environments, and practical AI workflows with LLMs, AI agents, and n8n automation.

points: Supported Linux-based environments and deployment-adjacent tasks for web applications.
Assisted with containerization, configuration, and maintenance of technical runtime environments.
Analyzed logs, incidents, and operating issues, then documented fixes and handoff steps for the team.
Worked with developers on releases, configuration updates, and stable operating workflows.
Built an AI-assisted vehicle pricing system using real online listings as source data.
Implemented backend logic, REST APIs, and data processing with Laravel and JavaScript.
Structured and cleaned data flows for traceable analysis and stable workflows.
Documented technical solutions and collaborated on product-facing features.
Teach programming, algorithms, networking, and hardware/software fundamentals.
Design practical exercises and mentor projects focused on debugging and logical problem solving.
Communicate technical topics clearly while strengthening teamwork and structured work habits.
Analyzed requirements and produced UML models for a mobile agriculture management application.
Implemented backend features, database logic, and technical integration points.
Worked in a Git-based, team-oriented development workflow.
Installed and configured hardware, software, and IT workstations.
Resolved technical issues systematically and supported users on infrastructure needs.
Built practical experience in support, systems, and technical documentation.

education.degree: Master in Data Science and Data Engineering
education.details: Advanced training in data-focused methods, structured analysis, and technical problem solving.

Focus on Java, data structures, algorithms, databases, software development, AI fundamentals, software architecture, operating systems, and computer networks. Degree recognized through ZAB evaluation.
